title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The bank is financing to farmers through various post-harvest funding products in order to avoid distress sale immediately after the harvest. Funding to farmers against hypothecation of agri produce is a variant of post-harvest funding in which farmers can avail the finance against agri produce in a hassle free manner. It ensures post-harvest funding for major agri produces and improves better price realization, besides ensuring availability of quality produce round the year. 
CC limit - Minimum Rs.5 lakh and Maximum – Rs. 50 Lakh

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
